body_txt: There are a lot of shows that focus on a place of business, and many of them get Strictly Formula after a while and need a Retool . Sometimes a change of management can bring life back into an old show, or at least add conflict for a while. Sometimes this is an excuse to stage a Tyrant Takes the Helm story. Sometimes, this is an excuse to stick the heroes in charge. Under New Management refers to a permanent change in management — or at least long enough for a full story arc. When the boss being replaced is back by the end of the episode it's a 10-Minute Retirement . This is not The Protagonist being thrust into a recently vacated position and suddenly finding himself in charge of an organization while he's still learning the ropes . That's You Are in Command Now . Often associated with We Don't Suck Anymore , They Changed It, Now It Sucks! , and Nothing Is the Same Anymore . If done badly can lead to Meet the New Boss .
